name: @intentsolutionsio/deployment-rollback-manager
description: Manage and execute deployment rollbacks with safety checks

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install deployment-rollback-manager\\n  or /plugin install deployment-rollback-manager@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
